title: FIGS at Goldman Sachs Conference: Strategic Growth Amid Challenges
text: FIGS management presented at Goldman Sachs conference detailing strategic approach to growth amid macro headwinds. Company emphasized three core strategic pillars: international expansion with focus on Asia, omnichannel retail development through Community Hubs, and B2B institutional sales through TEAMS platform. Management highlighted brand strength and purpose-driven positioning as differentiator in competitive healthcare apparel market. Discussed margin structure, tariff mitigation strategies, and plans for sustainable growth through product innovation and market expansion. Company noting consumer resilience in healthcare professional segment despite macro uncertainty. International opportunity remains massive with over 80% of global healthcare workers outside U.S. marking significant long-term TAM expansion opportunity.
